arts.ttl: Ajax can repay Man Utd for Ten Hag and Antony with THIS transfer
arts.sum: Ajax can repay Man Utd for Ten Hag and Antony with THIS transfer Now the Johan Cruyff Arena club may just start to repay the favour, though, by completing a move that could unlock another problem player for Amorim: Marcus Rashford .

arts.ttl: Europa League final day - who is through and what's at stake?
arts.sum: Manchester United, Tottenham and Rangers all have something at stake on what promises to be a thrilling final day of the Europa League league phase.

arts.ttl: Bobby Clark 'wanted' by Rangers on loan with Matondo emerging as Ajax transfer wildcard and Lawrence bid 'escalates'
arts.sum: It could be a frantic end to the month at Ibrox with deadline day fast approaching

arts.ttl: Ajax considering late swoop for out-of-favour Barcelona winger Ansu Fati
arts.sum: Ajax are in the market for a new winger before Monday’s transfer deadline. According to De Telegraaf, the Dutch giants have put together a four-man shortlist with FC Barcelona’s Ansu…

arts.ttl: Galatasaray table £8m bid for Kyle Walker-Peters - but the Southampton defender is keen to see out his contract and stay until the summer
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: alker-Peters has played 22 times for the Saints this season, but Ivan Juric's side are destined for an immediate return to the Championship, sitting on just six points.

arts.ttl: Jorrel Hato reveals transfer plans amid Liverpool and Chelsea links
arts.sum: Jorrel Hato reveals transfer plans amid Liverpool and Chelsea links Transfer market expert Rudy Galetti confirmed Liverpool's interest in Hato last weekend and reported that Ajax wanted at least €30 million for the versatile defender.

arts.ttl: Ajax star Jorrel Hato breaks silence to announce transfer decision after Liverpool visit
arts.sum: Liverpool target Jarrel Hato was seen at Anfield last week, but the Ajax star has suggested that he has no plans to move elsewhere despite strong links to the Premier League

arts.ttl: Galatasaray’s €65 Million Bid for Osimhen Rejected by Napoli
arts.sum: Galatasaray have made a bold move to secure Victor Osimhen's services permanently, offering Napoli €65 million for the striker. However, Napoli's president, Aurelio De Laurentiis, has politely declined the proposal, preferring to wait until the summer transfer window. The post Galatasaray’s €65 Million Bid for Osimhen Rejected by Napoli appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer target reveals he “was invited” to Anfield by Reds star
arts.sum: Ajax defender Jorrel Hato has spoken out on why he was recently spotted at Anfield for the game between Liverpool and Ipswich Town. The highly-rated 18-year-old has previously been linked with the Reds by journalist Graeme Bailey and it’s fair to say his presence at last weekend’s game will have raised more than a few eyebrows.
